scope: Plan the discovery-first hybrid MiroFish pipeline

problem.summary: The current MiroFish system evaluates a hand-selected universe well enough for comparison, but it does not independently discover new domain chips from user demand, specialization intent, and mastery intent.
problem.decision: Adopt a hybrid architecture rather than a fully open or fully seeded one.

recommended_architecture.hard_boundary: Discovery and evaluation must remain separate so the system cannot invent and validate the same candidate in one pass.

deliverables.purpose: Defines the target architecture, candidate contract, harnesses, phases, and first tranche.
Links the main repo execution plan to the new MiroFish discovery-factory plan.

first_tranche: Feed cleaned candidates into a smaller MiroFish evaluation run
